MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Theres Ford, is present.
Attorney, David Foran, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Richard Mabrey, is present.
Attorney, Matthew Gale, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Koorosh Afshari, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of NOV-08-2010 is vacated.
